label: 257_economic dialogue_strategic economic_states china_economic track
description: The U.S.-China Strategic and Economic Dialogue involved meetings led by Treasury Secretary Jacob J. Lew and Chinese Vice Premier Wang Yang, focusing on economic cooperation between the two nations from 2010 to 2021.

earliest_articles.excerpt: (Archived Content) TG-715 My colleagues and I are grateful to Vice Premier Wang, Councilor Dai and all of your colleagues for welcoming us to Beijing.
